title: [Bug]: Theme persistence failure across sub-pages (Docs and Catalog navigation)
description:
### Describe the bug
When a user switches the website theme from Light Mode to Dark Mode using the top-right toggle switch on the homepage, the selection does not persist when navigating to other sub-pages like `/docs` or `/catalog`. The new pages flash back to the default layout theme state or fail to sync the toggle icon state.

### Steps to reproduce
1. Go to `https://meshery.io/`.
2. Click on the theme toggle switch in the navbar to change to Dark Mode.
3. Observe the background turns dark.
